example.title: Example Page
example.subtitle: Wireframe template
example.heroText: This is an example hero section. Replace this content with your own wireframe layout.
example.feature1Desc: Toggle the Scope button in the top bar to see MVP annotations, notes, and issue tracker links.
example.feature2Desc: Each page has a review status badge: WIP, Review, With client, or Approved.
example.feature3Desc: All copy lives in strings/en.json for easy editing and future localisation.
example.contactText: A post-MVP contact form placeholder. The scope overlay marks this as post-MVP with an orange bar.
